Notes: Filmed in 4K, released in 1080p and 4K. Filmed between a couple heads that occasionally got in the way when they leaned toward each other or when the guy lifted his arm to scratch his head - but rarely blocks significant action. A couple drop-outs when people nearby came in late or left early. Camera did not do well with one scene using a lot of blue light, but the rest of the show is beautifully filmed. Never to be sold except by master, never to be posted anywhere online. NFT (not for trade) and sales only through master until November 28, 2023.

Notes: Beautiful 4K capture of the 2022-2023 National Tour! An especially hilarious performance from all in this updated script with relevant references of today. It's filmed in 16:9 from the front center grand tier with a mix of wides, mediums, and closeups. There's no obstructions or blackouts but there is some occasional washout due to the spotlights used during darker scenes such as the Jailhouse. The sound is excellent
